關於我們About Us

彰化走向世界 From Changhua to the World

續發國際貿易有限公司（Constant Fortune International）成立於1992年，位於台灣彰化市，是台灣最具規模的鞋材製造與出口商之一。

我們不只是材料供應商——我們是全球時尚供應鏈的策略夥伴，攜手 Timberland、Adidas、Lacoste、ECCO 等國際知名品牌，共同打造世界級的鞋業產品。

秉持「誠信第一、永續經營」的核心理念，我們在超過60個國家建立穩固的合作關係，以品質和信用贏得客戶長達三十年的信任。

Founded in 1992, Constant Fortune International Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Changhua City, Taiwan, and stands as one of the largest shoe material manufacturers and exporters in the country.

We are more than a materials supplier — we are a strategic partner in the global fashion supply chain, collaborating with internationally renowned brands including Timberland, Adidas, Lacoste, and ECCO.

Guided by the principles of integrity and sustainable growth, we have built enduring partnerships across more than 60 countries, earning decades of client trust through consistent quality and reliability.

台版金皇宮Taiwan Golden Palace
企業總部Our Headquarters

融合日本、德國、義大利建材精華，歷時五年精心打造的「台版金皇宮」，是我們招待全球合作夥伴的驕傲舞台。整棟建築具備頂級耐震、防火、防水等科技環保功能，流線型金色裝飾與水晶燈飾貫穿全樓，盡顯奢華品味。

Our headquarters, affectionately known as the "Taiwan Golden Palace," was meticulously crafted over five years, integrating premium building materials from Japan, Germany, and Italy. Featuring state-of-the-art seismic, fire, and waterproofing technologies, the building is adorned throughout with fluid gold finishes and crystal lighting — a proud stage for welcoming our global partners.

產品項目Our Products

鞋材全方位供應 Comprehensive Shoe Material Solutions

◈

織布類Textile

網布、氣孔網布、Cambrelle、不織布、帆布、仿麂皮、針織布、微纖維等。Mesh, Air Mesh, Cambrelle, Non Woven, Canvas, Micro Suede, Knitted Fabric, Microfiber and more.

⬡

五金配件Hardware

扣環、雞眼、鉚釘、裝飾件、D型環、勾扣、金屬標誌、撞釘等各式五金。Buckle, Eyelet, Rivet, Ornament, D-Ring, Hook, Metal Logo, Snap Button and more.

◉

合成皮革Synthetic

PU、PVC、超細纖維、防水PU等多種合成材料。PU, PVC, Micro Fiber, Non-Wicking PU and various synthetic materials.

⊞

輔料配件Accessories

魔鬼氈、拉鍊、鞋帶、蠟繩、織帶等。Velcro, Zipper, Shoe Lace, Waxed Lace, Webbing and more.

▣

內底材料Board & Foam

紙板、乳膠海綿、仿毛、各式底材。Paper Board, Latex Sponge, Faux Fur and various insole materials.

✦

客製服務Custom Solutions

依客戶需求提供客製化開發、樣品打樣、配色選色等全方位服務。Custom development, sample prototyping, color matching, and full-service support tailored to client specifications.

60+

全球版圖Global Reach

外銷超過60個國家 Exporting to Over 60 Countries

我們的鞋材產品遍布全球，涵蓋歐洲、亞洲、大洋洲、中東、中美洲及東歐等地區的知名鞋業市場。 Our shoe materials reach markets across Europe, Asia, Oceania, the Middle East, Central America, and Eastern Europe.

合作夥伴Strategic Partners

世界知名品牌的信賴之選 Trusted by the World's Leading Brands

我們的鞋材被用於全球多個頂尖品牌的生產線，以品質與誠信成就長達三十年的夥伴關係。 Our materials are used by some of the world's most iconic footwear brands, with partnerships built on quality and integrity spanning over three decades.

TIMBERLAND
ADIDAS
LACOSTE
ECCO

經營理念Our Values

成功的根基 The Foundation of Success

01

誠信第一Integrity First

說到做到是我們最核心的承諾。無論對客戶、廠商或員工，信用始終是我們最珍貴的資產。We keep every promise made. Whether to clients, suppliers, or employees, our word is our most prized asset.

02

品質卓越Quality Excellence

所有產品以100%真實品質交付，導入最先進的研發團隊，確保每一批材料符合最嚴格的標準。All products are delivered with 100% authentic quality. Our best-in-class R&D team ensures every material batch meets the strictest standards.

03

永續共好Sustainable Growth

我們不只追求企業獲利，更積極回饋社會，關懷弱勢族群，致力成為一個「超幸福企業」。Beyond profit, we actively give back to society, support vulnerable communities, and strive to be an enterprise defined by genuine happiness and purpose.

Jinny Tsai
蔡慧惠
董事長 · 續發國際貿易 President · Constant Fortune International

董事長介紹About the President

從彰化出發，走向世界 From Changhua to the Global Stage

「我只要講出來的一定做到，說到做到，這是我最重要的原則。」 "Whatever I say, I will do. My word is my commitment — that is my most important principle."

蔡慧惠，人稱「天后」，創業逾33年，白手起家建立起台灣鞋材界的金字招牌。她以真誠與熱情對待每一位合作夥伴，讓許多客戶不只是生意夥伴，更成為長達十餘年的好友。

她不只是成功的企業家，更熱心投入公益活動——關懷社區老人、為學校建設圖書館，用行動實踐「因為我，讓周邊的人更好」的人生哲學。

蔡慧惠相信，根留台灣、誠信經營，才是企業長久之道。她以彰化為根，以全球60多國為舞台，持續輻射台灣鞋業的影響力。

Jinny Tsai, affectionately known as "The Queen," has built one of Taiwan's most respected shoe material companies over more than 33 years. Her genuine warmth and passion turn business partners into lasting friendships that span decades.

Beyond business, she is deeply committed to social causes — caring for elderly community members and funding school libraries — living her philosophy: "Because of me, the people around me become better."

Jinny believes that staying rooted in Taiwan and operating with integrity is the only sustainable path forward. From Changhua, she continues to amplify Taiwan's footwear industry influence across more than 60 countries worldwide.
